summary: Completed comprehensive testing of miLessonPlan rebranding. All branding changes verified: 'MiLesson Plan' replaced with 'miLessonPlan', logo.jpg used everywhere, 'Made with Emergent' badge removed, PWA support added with manifest.json and service-worker.js, referral links use mi-lessonplan.site domain.
passed_tests: Backend: manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with short_name='miLessonPlan'
Backend: service-worker.js accessible at /service-worker.js with milessonplan cache name
Backend: icon-192x192.png exists
Backend: icon-512x512.png exists
Backend: favicon.ico exists
Backend: logo.jpg exists
Backend: GET /api/teacher/referral/my-code returns mi-lessonplan.site URLs
Backend: Login page accessible with miLessonPlan title
Backend: No emergent-badge in HTML
Backend: API health check passes
Frontend: Login page title is 'miLessonPlan'
Frontend: Login page has logo with alt='miLessonPlan' and src=/logo.jpg
Frontend: Login page H1 contains 'miLessonPlan'
Frontend: No old branding 'MiLesson Plan' on login page
Frontend: No 'Made with Emergent' badge on login page
Frontend: No emergent-badge element on login page
Frontend: Admin login page contains 'miLessonPlan'
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'miLessonPlan Admin' with logo
Frontend: Admin dashboard has logo with alt='miLessonPlan'
Frontend: SharedView page shows 'Go to miLessonPlan' link
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rebranding from 'MiLesson Plan' to 'miLessonPlan' fully verified. PWA assets (manifest.json, service-worker.js, icons) all accessible. Logo at /logo.jpg renders correctly. Emergent badge removed from index.html. Referral links use mi-lessonplan.site domain. InstallPrompt component exists and is imported in App.js (cannot test beforeinstallprompt event in automated testing).

install_prompt.note: Cannot test beforeinstallprompt event in automated testing

removed_elements.made_with_emergent: Not present in any rendered page
removed_elements.old_branding: 'MiLesson Plan' not found in frontend code
